ch6_start.text: The muffled scream came from the Comms Tower. The corridor is freezing, and you feel a strange itch on your arm. The air tastes faintly of copper.

ch6_comms_tower.text: Inside, Chloe the comms officer is shivering in the corner. The radio console is broadcasting a voice. It's Miller's voice. 'It's so cold... why did you leave me in the dark...'
ch6_comms_tower.speaker: Miller (Radio)

ch6_chloe_breakdown.text: Chloe covers her ears. 'I deleted the first distress call! I thought it was a prank, and I didn't want to wake Corporate! Now they're dead, and they won't stop talking to me!'
ch6_chloe_breakdown.speaker: Chloe

ch6_radio_off.text: You smash the power switch. The room falls silent, except for Chloe's sobbing. You look down at your arm. The veins are turning a faint, sickly black. The infection has begun.

choices.text: Leave the Comms Tower and look for medical help.
